name: Rending Talons
effect: Razor-edged chitinous blades grown from the forearm. Severs power armor plating on focused strike. +30% melee damage vs armored targets.

name: Acid Launcher
effect: Bio-organic sac launcher firing pressurized acid globules. Melts vehicle plating on contact. +40% damage vs vehicles and structures.

name: Spine Barrage
effect: Compressed burst of hundreds of hollow-tipped toxic spines. AOE cone, 8m. Inflicts Poison: -1 HP/cycle for 3 cycles.

name: Chitinous Carapace
effect: Layered organic shell grown over vital organs. Self-seals around minor wounds between engagements. +2 base defense.

name: Regeneration Membrane
effect: Sub-dermal tissue layer that actively heals damage. Regenerate 1 HP per cycle while not in active combat.

name: Spore Grenade
effect: Biological grenade bursting into choking toxic spore cloud. Suppresses unit vision, applies Poison status, and disables ranged attack for 1 cycle.

name: Synapse Relay Node
effect: Organic psionic relay grown into the spine. Boosts Synapse command range +2 hexes for all nearby Vorax units.

name: Venom-Tipped Rounds
effect: Biological toxin coating on all projectiles. Units hit suffer Poison: -1 HP/cycle for 3 cycles regardless of armor.

name: Hive-Link Transmitter
effect: Biological psionic uplink to the Hive fleet. Shares all unit sensor data with the Synapse-Brain in range. +1 Intel/cycle on this planet.
